arts.ttl: ‘Not true’ – Real Madrid boss Ancelotti hits back at fans and critics
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has this weekend moved to fire a message of defiance to his many critics. This comes amid long-standing questions over the Italian’s use of…

arts.ttl: AC Milan willing to sell previous Real Madrid target for €50m
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been strongly linked with Alphonso Davies for much of the last 12 months, and although at one stage it seemed inevitable that he would join as a free agent next summer, it is now more likely that the Canadian defender signs a new contract at Bayern Munich. If that happens, Los Blancos […] The post AC Milan willing to sell previous Real Madrid target for €50m appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s Kylian Mbappé pips Arsenal star to prestigious individual award
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has this weekend secured for himself a fresh, and altogether prestigious individual accolade. The prize in question? French Player of the Year for 2023/24. Mbappé’s…

arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Madrid 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Venue : Estadio de Vallecas, Madrid, Spain. Rayo are always a very strong home team and winter nights at the Estadio de Vallecas tend to be extremely cold.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'want £50m centre-back next summer' amid ongoing defensive issues at Bernabeu
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly interested in signing Borussia Dortmund defender Nico Schlotterbeck during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man United 'handed major transfer boost' as Real Madrid 'withdraw' from defender race
arts.sum: Real Madrid allegedly decide against a move for AC Milan's Theo Hernandez next summer, potentially opening the door for Manchester United to sign him.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Dépor ABANCA vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: As for availability, Melanie Leupolz is back to the squad while Maëlle Lakrar is still out for discomfort that prevented her from being available for this week's games. Real Madrid will face Deportivo ABANCA on matchday 13 of Liga F.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold breaks silence on Liverpool future - as links to Real Madrid ramp up with his contract up in the summer
arts.sum: The defender has been at the Reds since 2004, breaking into the first team in 2016 and quickly becoming a fan favourite with his pinpoint crosses and dangerous set pieces.

arts.ttl: Mbappe knights Saliba as Real Madrid circle for Arsenal superstar
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has been honoured as France's best footballer of the 2023/24 season, but he believes that William Saliba would have been just as deserving of the award. Mbappe knights Saliba as Real Madrid circle for Arsenal superstar

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'face Real Madrid & Barcelona competition' to re-sign defender
arts.sum: Man Utd will reportedly battle Barcelona and Real Madrid to sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras.
